name: Raisin Scones
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup Raisins; soaked in hot water for 1/2 hour, drained
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift the dry ingredients together.
2. Cut the butter into the dry ingredients using a pastry blender.
3. Add the drained raisins to the flour mixture.
4. Mix the half-and-half with the beaten egg and stir into the flour mixture.
5. Use a fork, and do not overmix. The dough should be only slightly combined, taking a few turns to achieve.
6. Divide the dough into 3 balls.
7. Pat each ball into a 1/2-inch-thick circle.
8. Cut each circle into 4 triangular scones.
9. Bake on an ungreased baking sheet at 450 degrees for about 12 minutes, or until golden brown.
10. Serve with butter and raspberry jam.
